results.idle: Search for flights to see offers.

pricemap.howItWorksBody: Aviasales is the go-to flight metasearch engine, allowing you to compare all the flight options available according to the filters you set and then book them on airlines’ and agencies’ websites.
footer.priceDrop: We’ll notify you if the ticket price drops.
footer.disclaimer: We don’t sell tickets — we just help find the cheapest ones. Totally free.
locale.countryHint: Select a country to see more tickets from local carriers. Sometimes such tickets are cheaper
searchRoute.noDirectBody: Try searching for tickets with layovers or changing the departure airport.
footer.mepCompanyName: Mep Future Design Mühendislik Ticaret Ltd. Şti.
insurance.partnersSubtitle: We compare products from leading Turkish insurers—including Hepiyi, Mapfre, Sompo Japan, Doğa, and Quick—so you can see clear options and our best available deals.
insurance.comprehensive.heroSubtitle: Secure your vehicle in all situations.
insurance.comprehensive.introP1: Comprehensive car insurance is an optional type of insurance that protects your vehicle against unexpected risks. It provides coverage against many risks such as traffic accidents, collisions, theft, fire, natural disasters, and damages that may be caused by third parties.
insurance.comprehensive.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable comprehensive car insurance package for your needs.
insurance.comprehensive.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and policy wording.
insurance.comprehensive.stepsLead: Three simple steps to tailor your quote.
insurance.comprehensive.step1Body: Share details about drivers, your vehicle, and where the car is kept.
insurance.comprehensive.step2Body: Select Mini, Limited, Extended, or Full comprehensive — we capture mileage, equipment, and optional extras.
insurance.comprehensive.step3Body: Review indicative options side by side and finalize your policy with our team.
insurance.comprehensive.whyLead: Independent comparison, clear advice, and support based in Ankara.
insurance.comprehensive.why1: Compare offers from multiple insurance companies.
insurance.comprehensive.why2: Best price options for your profile.
insurance.comprehensive.why3: Fast policy issuance when you are ready to proceed.
insurance.comprehensive.why4: Professional support in case of damage or a claim.
insurance.comprehensive.why5: Reliable consulting services based in Ankara.
insurance.comprehensive.pricingTitle: How are car insurance prices determined?
insurance.comprehensive.pricingBody: Premiums vary depending on the vehicle's make and model, age, intended use, the driver's accident history, and the chosen coverage. Contact us for the most accurate quote.
insurance.comprehensive.tableFootnote: Figures are examples only and do not constitute an offer. Actual premiums depend on underwriting criteria.
insurance.comprehensive.typesSectionLead: Different insurance options are available to suit your needs.
insurance.comprehensive.typeLimitedDesc: Limited coverage against a defined set of risks.
insurance.comprehensive.typeExtendedDesc: Broader protection for more scenarios on the road.
insurance.comprehensive.typeFullDesc: Maximum breadth of cover within your chosen programme.
insurance.comprehensive.expertQuote: Comprehensive cover is about matching the policy to how you use the car — not paying for extras you do not need. Start with your driving pattern, then layer optional protections.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide1Quot: Comprehensive cover is about matching the policy to how you use the car — not paying for extras you do not need. Start with your driving pattern, then layer optional protections.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide2Quot: Deductibles and approved repair networks matter as much as the headline premium — compare like for like before you bind cover.
insurance.comprehensive.expertSlide3Quot: At renewal, revisit mileage, where you park, and any accessories — small changes often mean your cover should change too.
insurance.comprehensive.coverTitle: What does comprehensive car insurance cover?
insurance.comprehensive.coverLead: A standard comprehensive car insurance policy may include the following coverages (subject to policy terms):
insurance.comprehensive.coverItem8: Coverage can be expanded depending on the policy you choose.
insurance.comprehensive.compareLead: Illustrative comparison across tiers — always read your policy schedule and wording.
insurance.comprehensive.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for accurate pricing based on your vehicle and driving profile.
insurance.home.heroSubtitle: Protect your home and belongings in all situations.
insurance.home.introP1: Home insurance is a comprehensive type of insurance that protects your home and its contents against unexpected risks. It provides financial security against fire, flood, theft, natural disasters, and many other risks.
insurance.home.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable home insurance package for your needs.
insurance.home.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.home.needGuideP1: Home insurance isn't a legal requirement but it's definitely worth considering. In some cases you are required to buy a policy as a condition of your mortgage when buying a property.
insurance.home.needGuideP2: A buildings insurance policy is designed to help with the cost of rebuilding your home if it is damaged by fire or flooding. Or it can help to pay for the cost of a damaged roof, for example. It varies by policy but buildings insurance also covers general repairs such as roof repair, or any damage to internal pipes.
insurance.home.needGuideP3: Contents insurance is designed to provide cover to help you protect your belongings if they are stolen or damaged.
insurance.home.needGuideP4: Shopping around for the best house insurance quote is vital, but bear in mind that the cheapest policy isn't always the most suitable.
insurance.home.compareTitle: Compare home insurance with İlsa Insurance
insurance.home.compareLead: In just a few minutes you can review indicative home quotes with our straightforward process — backed by brokers who work with multiple trusted insurers.
insurance.home.compareStep1Body: We compare options from a broad panel of providers so you see a representative range of prices and cover levels for your property.
insurance.home.compareStep2Body: A streamlined quote journey means you can move from enquiry to a shortlist quickly, with policy wording explained in plain language.
insurance.home.compareStep3Body: We are not owned by a single insurance company. Our priority is finding cover that fits your home, contents, and budget — not pushing one brand.
insurance.home.typesTitle: Choose the right type of home insurance
insurance.home.typesLead: Whether you are buying your first home, renting, or looking for a better deal, here are three main ways to protect your home and belongings:
insurance.home.typeBuildingsBody:
Cover for the structure of your home — walls, roof, and permanent fixtures such as fitted kitchens and bathrooms.

If you own the property, buildings cover is essential; mortgage lenders usually require it.

Top tip: Base your sum insured on rebuild cost, not only market value.
insurance.home.typeContentsBody:
Protects belongings that would move with you — furniture, electronics, clothing, and more — against risks such as fire, theft, and escape of water.

If you rent, your landlord insures the building; a tenant-focused contents policy protects your possessions. Homeowners typically arrange their own contents cover.
insurance.home.typeCombinedBody:
One policy for both the building and your contents — often simpler with a single renewal date and contact point, and it can be more cost-effective than two separate policies.

Ideal for homeowners who want comprehensive protection for structure and belongings together.
insurance.home.costsCol1P1: Knowing what you might pay helps you avoid overpaying. Across our indicative portfolio, a typical combined buildings-and-contents policy is around ₺9,800 per year* — but your figure will depend on location, construction, and sums insured.
insurance.home.costsCol1P2: Premiums can move with rebuild costs, inflation, and insurer appetite. That is why it is a good time to compare quotes with İlsa Insurance and see whether you can improve cover or price at renewal.
insurance.home.costsTableLead: Illustrative averages from our comparison data — combined, buildings-only, and contents-only:
insurance.home.costsTableFootnote: *Illustrative figures for this page only — not live market data. Contact İlsa Insurance for a binding quote tailored to your property.
insurance.home.premiumLead: National averages are a benchmark, but your individual quote is shaped by a few specific factors:
insurance.home.premiumIndividualBody:
Your postcode: Insurers assess local risks such as flood exposure and regional claims patterns.

Property age: Older homes can cost more to repair; newer builds may benefit from modern standards.

Security measures: Alarms, quality locks, and neighbourhood watch schemes can reduce perceived risk.
insurance.home.premiumRegionalBody:
Competition among insurers can soften quoted prices even when rebuild costs are elevated.

If you have not switched in the last 12 months, your renewal offer may be above current market rates — comparing can help.
insurance.home.expertSlide1Quote: Home cover should reflect how you live in the property — do not under-insure the rebuild cost, and do not pay for contents extensions you will never use.
insurance.home.expertSlide2Quote: Escape of water and storm claims drive a large share of home losses — check excess levels, trace-and-access cover, and accidental damage options before you bind.
insurance.home.expertSlide3Quote: At renewal, update sums insured, any extensions, and security upgrades — small changes to the home often mean your policy should change too.
insurance.home.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.home.coverFootnote: Coverage can be expanded depending on the insurance company and the chosen package.
insurance.home.daskTitle: The difference between DASK (Compulsory Earthquake Insurance) and home insurance
insurance.home.daskBody: Compulsory earthquake insurance (DASK) only covers structural damage caused by earthquakes. Home insurance, on the other hand, covers fire, flood, theft, and many additional risks. For the most comprehensive protection, both types of insurance are recommended.
insurance.home.whyLead: Local expertise with access to multiple insurers.
insurance.home.why1: Compare offers from multiple insurance companies.
insurance.home.why5: Professional support during the claims process.
insurance.home.pricingTitle: How are home insurance prices determined?
insurance.home.pricingBody: Premiums are determined based on the location of the property, its square footage, building type, the value of the contents, and the coverage chosen. Contact us to receive the most accurate price quote.
insurance.home.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored home insurance quote.
insurance.health.heroSubtitle: Access private healthcare and protect your budget when it matters.
insurance.health.introP1: Health insurance is an important safeguard that ensures you receive quality healthcare in private hospitals in case of unexpected illnesses and accidents.
insurance.health.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable individual or family health insurance package for your needs.
insurance.health.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.health.eduWhatIntro: Health insurance in the UK is an insurance policy that provides healthcare cover in addition to the healthcare that everyone is entitled to on the National Health Service (NHS).
insurance.health.eduWhatBullet1Desc: Reduces your waiting time by allowing you to access private healthcare for you and your family.
insurance.health.eduWhatBullet2Desc: The greater your cover, the higher the premiums are likely to be.
insurance.health.eduWhatBullet3Title: Choose when and where you're treated
insurance.health.eduWhatBullet3Desc: If you want to be treated at a private hospital, or you need specialist treatment, then private healthcare insurance could be an option for you.
insurance.health.eduWhatClosing: You'll receive help for acute (immediate) conditions, and may also receive treatment for ongoing issues, depending on your policy.
insurance.health.eduNeedTitle: Do I need private health insurance?
insurance.health.eduNeedIntro: Health insurance, otherwise known as private health care or private medical insurance, allows you to receive private medical treatment for a fee.
insurance.health.eduNeedBullet1Desc: Some workplace benefit and pension schemes include private healthcare as part of their packages for staff. In that case, you may find that private healthcare is included for you and your family.
insurance.health.eduNeedBullet2Desc: However, if your workplace doesn't offer private health insurance as a benefit, or you work for yourself, then private health insurance can be useful if you need to be treated quickly at a hospital close to your home, and not have to join an NHS waiting list.
insurance.health.eduNeedLearnMore: Learn more about finding the right health cover for you.
insurance.health.workLead: Three simple steps to compare and apply for health cover.
insurance.health.step1Body: Get personalised quotes in minutes by sharing who needs cover, ages, and your preferred start date.
insurance.health.step2Body: We help you explore indicative options from multiple insurers so you can choose the level of health cover that fits you.
insurance.health.step3Body: When you are ready, complete your application with our team or online — we support you through policy issuance.
insurance.health.buyItem1Body: To get started with a medical insurance plan, compare quotes with İlsa Insurance — we gather options from several companies side by side.
insurance.health.buyItem2Body: You can complete your application online or call our Ankara team. We work with you to find a competitive private healthcare plan for your profile.
insurance.health.buyItem3Body:
Tell us when you want cover to begin and the premium range you have in mind.

You will need each insured person's name and date of birth, plus who should be included on the policy.

Then you can review different quotes and compare levels of cover. For more guidance, speak with our consultants.
insurance.health.basicCoverDesc: This typically pays for treatment when you are admitted as an inpatient — staying overnight in hospital — subject to your policy wording.
insurance.health.mediumCoverDesc: This can include additional care when you are an outpatient — you attend for treatment but are not admitted — depending on the package you choose.
insurance.health.expertSlide1Quote: Health cover should match who needs protection and how you use care — not paying for benefits you will not use. Start with inpatient versus outpatient priorities, then add optional benefits that fit your family.
insurance.health.expertSlide2Quote: Network hospitals, deductibles, and annual limits matter as much as the headline premium — compare policies on the same basis before you bind cover.
insurance.health.expertSlide3Quote: At renewal, update ages, family members, and any chronic conditions — small life changes often mean your cover should change too.
insurance.health.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy type, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.health.coverFootnote: Coverage scope may vary depending on the insurance company and the chosen package.
insurance.health.supplementaryBody: Supplementary health insurance allows you to receive services at private hospitals contracted with the Social Security Institution (SGK) without paying any difference in fees. You can benefit from a wide range of health services with more affordable premiums.
insurance.health.whyLead: Compare options and move quickly with local support.
insurance.health.pricingTitle: How are health insurance prices determined?
insurance.health.pricingBody: Premiums vary depending on age, current health status, chosen coverage, and insurance company. We compare different options to offer you the best possible deal.
insurance.health.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored health insurance quote.
insurance.life.heroSubtitle: Protect your loved ones and secure their finances when it matters.
insurance.life.introP1: Life insurance is an important safeguard that provides financial security for your family and loved ones if the unexpected happens.
insurance.life.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we help you determine the most suitable life insurance solution for your needs and budget.
insurance.life.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.life.typesNeedTitle: What type of life insurance do I need?
insurance.life.typesNeedIntro: There are two different types of life insurance policies that work in different ways:
insurance.life.typesNeedBullet1Desc: If you pass away during the policy term, your insurer will pay a lump sum agreed at the start of the policy.
insurance.life.typesNeedBullet2Desc: The amount of cover reduces in line with your debts or other liabilities, such as the balance on your mortgage. It's important to review this protection if you move home, or increase your mortgage.
insurance.life.whatIsP1: Life insurance helps protect your family and loved ones financially if you die. It pays out a lump sum to your beneficiaries, who can use it to pay for living expenses in the event of your death.
insurance.life.whatIsP2: It can be useful if you have dependants who rely on your income — for example to pay the mortgage or other bills. This could be a wife, husband, partner or children.
insurance.life.whatIsP3: The money can help them pay off the mortgage or cover other recurring expenses so there are no additional disruptions to their way of life.
insurance.life.workLead: Three simple steps to compare life cover with İlsa Insurance.
insurance.life.step1Body: Get personalised quotes in minutes by providing details about you and the cover you need.
insurance.life.step2Body: See how much different types of life insurance could cost you across insurers we work with.
insurance.life.step3Body: Start your policy straight away, or save your personalised quote. Note that indicative quotes are typically valid for a limited time — confirm timing with your advisor.
insurance.life.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy type, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.life.coverFootnote: Coverage may vary depending on the insurance company and policy plan.
insurance.life.important1: It ensures the financial security of your family.
insurance.life.important3: It provides financial support against unexpected risks.
insurance.life.important4: It provides the opportunity for future planning.
insurance.life.whoItem1: Those who want to secure their family's future
insurance.life.whoItem3: Those who want to make long-term financial plans
insurance.life.whyLead: Independent comparison with local support based in Ankara.
insurance.life.needAmountTitle: How much life insurance do I need?
insurance.life.needAmountIntro: You can estimate how much your loved ones would need each month by adding up regular family outgoings:
insurance.life.needAmountP1: The larger the potential pay-out you may need, the higher the monthly premiums can be. The term and sum insured depend on your age, health, and why you are taking out cover — older applicants and those in poorer health may be offered shorter terms or different terms.
insurance.life.needAmountP2: You might choose a combination of policies — for example a decreasing-term policy aligned with your mortgage plus level-term cover to leave your family financially comfortable.
insurance.life.needAmountLinkText: Take time calculating the cost of life insurance
insurance.life.bestQuoteTitle: How do I get the best life insurance quote?
insurance.life.bestQuoteP1: To find the best life insurance you will need to tell the insurer about your age, health, whether you smoke, your lifestyle and your occupation.
insurance.life.bestQuoteP2: In some cases you might need a medical examination depending on the answers you provide when applying.
insurance.life.bestQuoteP3: It is important that you answer all questions honestly when you complete your application — otherwise you risk claims being declined in future.
insurance.life.whenTitle: When should I take out life insurance?
insurance.life.whenP1: The younger you are, the cheaper your premiums are likely to be.
insurance.life.whenP2: Everyone with dependants and debts to pay should consider life insurance to protect their family financially.
insurance.life.whenP3: If you are covering a mortgage, align the policy term with the mortgage duration where appropriate.
insurance.life.whenP4: Premiums can start from a modest monthly amount — your adviser will explain what drives the price for your profile.
insurance.life.whenLinkText: Learn more about buying a life insurance policy
insurance.life.expertSlide1Quote: Life cover should match who depends on your income and how long they need support — align sums insured and policy term with mortgages, education costs, and other liabilities.
insurance.life.expertSlide2Quote: Disclosure matters — health and lifestyle questions affect acceptance and claims. Compare like-for-like benefits and exclusions, not only the headline premium.
insurance.life.expertSlide3Quote: Review cover at major life events — marriage, children, a new mortgage, or a career change often mean your protection should change too.
insurance.life.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to protect those who matter most?
insurance.life.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored life insurance quote.
insurance.motorbike.heroSubtitle: Legal and safe riding for motorbikes and scooters — meet your third-party liability obligations on the road.
insurance.motorbike.introP1: Compulsory traffic insurance is mandatory motor liability cover for vehicle owners. It covers bodily injury and material damage you may cause to others in an accident. At İlsa Insurance, we offer competitive compulsory traffic quotes in Ankara so you fulfil your legal duties and ride with confidence.
insurance.motorbike.introP2: Whether you ride a motorcycle, scooter, or moped, valid third-party cover is required before you use public roads.
insurance.motorbike.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and policy wording.
insurance.motorbike.whatIsP1: Compulsory motor liability insurance covers harm you cause to third parties — other people and their property — when you are at fault in a traffic accident. It does not cover damage to your own motorbike or scooter.
insurance.motorbike.whatIsP2: Premiums depend on vehicle class, usage, location, and driving history. We compare insurers side by side so you see clear options for compulsory cover tailored to riders.
insurance.motorbike.workLead: Three simple steps to compare compulsory traffic insurance with İlsa Insurance.
insurance.motorbike.step1Body: Share your bike registration, rider profile, and usage — get indicative quotes in minutes.
insurance.motorbike.step2Body: Review offers from multiple insurers we work with and check that limits and deductibles suit how you ride.
insurance.motorbike.step3Body: Complete your application with our team or online — we support fast policy issuance and renewal reminders.
insurance.motorbike.coverTitle: What does compulsory traffic insurance cover?
insurance.motorbike.coverLead: Compulsory motor liability insurance typically includes the following protections for third parties:
insurance.motorbike.coverItem1: Material damage to the other party's vehicle or property
insurance.motorbike.coverItem3: Medical treatment costs for injured third parties
insurance.motorbike.coverItem4: Permanent disability benefits where applicable under the policy
insurance.motorbike.coverItem5: Loss of support and related benefits in case of death, subject to limits and policy conditions
insurance.motorbike.coverFootnote: Compulsory traffic insurance does not cover damage to your own motorbike or scooter. For damage to your own vehicle, comprehensive (kasko) insurance should be considered.
insurance.motorbike.pricingBody: Premiums depend on criteria such as vehicle type and engine class, vehicle age, registration location (e.g. Ankara), the driver's accident and claims history, and each insurer's pricing rules. We compare offers from multiple companies to help you find an affordable compulsory policy.
insurance.motorbike.whyLead: Local support in Ankara for riders who need compulsory cover without hassle.
insurance.motorbike.why1: Reliable insurance consultancy based in Ankara.
insurance.motorbike.why5: Support when you need to report a claim.
insurance.motorbike.importantTitle: Why is compulsory traffic insurance important?
insurance.motorbike.important1: It is a legal requirement — riding without valid cover can lead to fines, penalties, and liability you must pay yourself.
insurance.motorbike.important2: It protects third parties if you cause injury or damage to their property.
insurance.motorbike.important3: It helps cover medical costs and compensation within policy limits after an at-fault accident.
insurance.motorbike.important4: Peace of mind every time you ride on public roads.
insurance.motorbike.expertSlide1Quote: Match your declared usage to how you actually ride — commuting and business use affect pricing and claims. Tell us your licence class, annual mileage, and security measures.
insurance.motorbike.expertSlide2Quote: Compulsory cover is for third parties only — if you want theft, fire, or damage to your own bike, ask about comprehensive (kasko) options alongside MTPL.
insurance.motorbike.expertSlide3Quote: Renew before expiry — a lapse can leave you uninsured on the road. Our reminders help you stay continuous and compliant.
insurance.motorbike.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to ride legally and safely?
insurance.motorbike.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored compulsory traffic insurance quote for your motorbike or scooter.
insurance.travel.introP1: Travel insurance provides protection against unexpected health and emergency risks you may encounter during your domestic and international travels.
insurance.travel.introP2: At İlsa Insurance, we offer comprehensive travel insurance solutions to ensure you travel with peace of mind during your vacation or business trips.
insurance.travel.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes.
insurance.travel.stepsLead: Three simple steps to a tailored travel quote.
insurance.travel.step1Body: We need the type of cover you want, your destination, travel dates, and how many travellers should be named on the policy.
insurance.travel.step2Body: We need ages and any pre-existing medical conditions. If others are included on the policy, we need the same details for them.
insurance.travel.step3Body: We run your details past the insurers we work with and show you comparable quotes. Read the policy wording carefully and choose the option that fits you best.
insurance.travel.costTitle: How much does travel insurance cost?
insurance.travel.costBody: The premium depends on your destination, trip length, age, medical history, activities planned, and the limits you choose. We compare options from multiple insurers so you see indicative pricing for your itinerary.
insurance.travel.costFootnote: *Illustrative information for this page — not live market rates. Contact İlsa Insurance for a binding quote.
insurance.travel.coverLead: Each policy differs. Depending on the plan you choose, you will often see cover such as:
insurance.travel.coverItem1Desc: Helps pay for urgent treatment if you become ill or injured during your trip, within the limits and conditions of your policy.
insurance.travel.coverItem2Desc: Inpatient and day-patient charges abroad can be covered when medically necessary and included in your wording.
insurance.travel.coverItem3Desc: Emergency ambulance or medically necessary transport arrangements may be included where the policy allows.
insurance.travel.coverItem4Desc: Compensation for checked baggage delayed beyond a set period, or for loss or theft of belongings, subject to limits and proof.
insurance.travel.coverItem5Desc: Reimbursement of prepaid travel costs when you must cancel or cut short the trip for an insured reason listed in the policy.
insurance.travel.coverItem6Desc: Essential relief for sudden dental pain and temporary treatment abroad, as defined in your certificate — not routine check-ups.
insurance.travel.coverItem7Desc: Benefits for repatriation or local funeral costs and related escort expenses where covered by the selected plan.
insurance.travel.coverFootnote: Coverage may vary depending on the duration of travel and the country visited.
insurance.travel.excludeTitle: What isn't covered by travel insurance?
insurance.travel.excludeLead: Read your policy documents carefully and make sure you understand common exclusions before you travel.
insurance.travel.exclude1Body: Failing to declare a medical condition when you buy cover can invalidate your policy. Medical bills abroad can be very high, so being upfront is essential.
insurance.travel.exclude2BeforeLink: Higher-risk activities such as skiing or scuba diving are often excluded on a standard policy. If you are planning these,
insurance.travel.exclude2Link: ask İlsa Insurance about extensions or specialist cover
insurance.travel.exclude3BeforeLink: Governments publish travel safety information for citizens.
insurance.travel.exclude3Link: Check official advisories for your destination
insurance.travel.exclude3AfterLink: — travelling against official advice can invalidate your insurance.
insurance.travel.exclude4Body: Insurers typically exclude claims where injury, loss, or damage occurs while you are under the influence of alcohol or non-prescribed drugs.
insurance.travel.extrasLead: Base travel insurance does not cover everything. You can often add optional benefits — remember that add-ons usually increase the premium.
insurance.travel.extra1Body: Covers alpine-style risks such as mountain rescue and lost ski passes, and can extend to your ski equipment, subject to terms.
insurance.travel.extra2Body: Covers accidental damage, loss, or theft of personal gadgets such as a phone or laptop while you are away.
insurance.travel.extra3Body: Can cover business equipment you travel with, such as a company laptop or phone, and sometimes business money, where included.
insurance.travel.extra4Body: Addresses cruise-specific risks such as missed ports, cabin confinement, and unused excursions, according to the policy wording.
insurance.travel.whoItem2: Those applying for a Schengen visa
insurance.travel.whoItem5: Those participating in student exchange programs
insurance.travel.schengenNote: Travel health insurance is mandatory, especially for travel to Schengen countries.
insurance.travel.whyLead: Fast issuance, visa-friendly certificates, and support when you need it.
insurance.travel.expertSlide1Quote: Buy cover as soon as you confirm travel dates — cancellation protection starts from the policy inception you choose, and medical limits should match your destination’s treatment costs.
insurance.travel.expertSlide2Quote: Declare pre-existing conditions honestly — undisclosed conditions can affect claims. For adventure activities, check extensions or specialist cover before you go.
insurance.travel.expertSlide3Quote: For Schengen visas, confirm minimum medical limits and policy wording match embassy requirements — we help you pick certificates suitable for your application.
insurance.travel.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored travel insurance quote.
insurance.personalAccident.heroSubtitle: Cover for death, disability, and medical costs after sudden accidents — at home, at work, or on the move.
insurance.personalAccident.introP1: Personal accident insurance pays agreed benefits after sudden, unforeseen accidents that may cause death, permanent disability, or medical treatment costs.
insurance.personalAccident.introP2: As İlsa Insurance we compare personal accident programmes from leading insurers so you can choose limits and extensions that match your profile.
insurance.personalAccident.mockDisclaime: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and policy wording.
insurance.personalAccident.overviewLead: Accidents are sudden; the right policy helps stabilise income, treatment costs, and family support when timing matters most.
insurance.personalAccident.overviewBody: İlsa Insurance works with multiple partner insurers so you see clear benefit options, transparent limits, and practical guidance through purchase and claims.
insurance.personalAccident.advLead: Personal accident insurance can provide capital or periodic benefits after permanent disability, injury, or death following an unexpected accident — subject to policy terms.
insurance.personalAccident.adv1Body: Know how to activate assistance, helplines, and claims reporting included with your plan. We explain the sequence so nothing is missed in a stressful moment.
insurance.personalAccident.adv2Body: Discuss extensions for sports, travel, higher medical limits, and hazardous activities so your schedule reflects how you really live and work.
insurance.personalAccident.adv3Body: We compare premium and benefit combinations from partner insurers so you can prioritise what matters most — not just the headline price.
insurance.personalAccident.whatIsBody:
Personal accident insurance provides financial support to your beneficiaries in the event of accidental death, and to you for disability or medical treatment within the policy definition of an accident. It helps secure everyday life against sudden, external events beyond your control.

You can often extend cover to include outdoor activities such as motorcycling, skiing, diving, mountaineering, sailing, and hunting — where permitted by the insurer and declared before inception.
insurance.personalAccident.coverTitle: What does personal accident insurance cover?
insurance.personalAccident.coverLead: Depending on the selected benefits, your policy may include:
insurance.personalAccident.coverItem3: Temporary loss of earnings / disability benefit
insurance.personalAccident.coverFootnote: Coverage can be widened or narrowed by policy conditions — always read your information form and general terms.
insurance.personalAccident.whoItem5: Anyone who wants family financial security
insurance.personalAccident.whoFootnote: Especially valuable if you lead an active lifestyle.
insurance.personalAccident.why2: Competitive premium options for your profile
insurance.personalAccident.why4: Fast policy placement when you decide
insurance.personalAccident.why5: Support through claims and loss events
insurance.personalAccident.pricingBody: Premiums depend on age, occupation, sum insured, and the scope of benefits. For the most accurate indication, speak with our specialist advisors.
insurance.personalAccident.expertSlide1Q: Declare risky hobbies and occupational exposures up front — personal accident underwriting hinges on accurate activity and duty disclosures.
insurance.personalAccident.expertSlide2Q: Check territorial limits if you travel often; extensions exist but must be added before the loss event, not after.
insurance.personalAccident.expertSlide3Q: Compare disability definitions and waiting periods — small wording differences decide whether a benefit pays in borderline cases.
insurance.personalAccident.faqSectionLea: Answers below refer to typical personal accident products — your binding wording always prevails. For bespoke advice, contact İlsa Insurance.
insurance.personalAccident.faq1Q: Is personal accident insurance valid outside Türkiye?
insurance.personalAccident.faq1A: Many policies can extend cover outside the Republic of Türkiye, but territories, limits, and exclusions vary. İlsa Insurance confirms scope with the insurer before you bind.
insurance.personalAccident.faq2Q: What is the duration of personal accident insurance?
insurance.personalAccident.faq2A: Policies are usually written for a fixed term — commonly one year — with renewal options. Longer terms may be available depending on product rules.
insurance.personalAccident.faq3Q: What coverage does personal accident insurance provide?
insurance.personalAccident.faq3A:
Depending on the product, benefits may include:

• Death benefit after an accident
• Permanent disability capital or annuity-style benefits
• Daily hospital cash
• Medical expense reimbursement within limits

Read your schedule for sub-limits and exclusions.
insurance.personalAccident.faq4A: It indemnifies consequences of bodily injury that meet the policy definition of an accident — sudden, external, and unintended. Benefits, waiting periods, and exclusions are set out in the general terms and your personal schedule.
insurance.personalAccident.faq5Q: What is the purpose of personal accident insurance?
insurance.personalAccident.faq5A: It reduces the financial shock after accidental injury or death by paying agreed sums to you or your beneficiaries, helping replace income and fund recovery.
insurance.personalAccident.faq6Q: What does personal accident insurance cover in practice?
insurance.personalAccident.faq6A: Examples can include serious injury from accidental explosions or fires, bites from venomous species where covered, and other sudden events defined in wording. Actual cover follows your contract.
insurance.personalAccident.faq7Q: What is the difference between life insurance and personal accident insurance?
insurance.personalAccident.faq7A: Life insurance may respond to natural death depending on contract type. Personal accident cover focuses on qualifying accidents within the policy period — the products complement each other.
insurance.personalAccident.faq8Q: Does personal accident insurance cover workplace accidents?
insurance.personalAccident.faq8A: Some policies include workplace accidents unless excluded; occupational disease or employer liability may be treated separately. We review definitions with you before purchase.
insurance.personalAccident.faq9Q: How do I cancel personal accident insurance?
insurance.personalAccident.faq9A: Submit a written cancellation via your broker or insurer and complete required forms. Any premium refund follows legal rules and unused term calculations.
insurance.personalAccident.faq10Q: How do I obtain personal accident insurance?
insurance.personalAccident.faq10A: Share age, occupation, hobbies, and desired sums insured; choose extensions if needed. İlsa Insurance compares partner programmes and issues cover when you accept terms.
insurance.personalAccident.faq11A: No — for most individuals it remains voluntary in Türkiye — yet it is a practical safeguard against accident risks in daily life and travel.
insurance.personalAccident.docsLead: Download the general terms and the product information form (PDFs). Always confirm the version matches your issued policy.
insurance.personalAccident.doc2Title: Quick personal accident insurance — information form
insurance.personalAccident.docsNote: Hosted PDFs are for convenience — confirm the revision matches your issued policy with İlsa Insurance if unsure.
insurance.personalAccident.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a tailored personal accident insurance quote.
insurance.dask.heroSubtitle: Mandatory, reliable protection for your home against earthquakes and quake-related damage.
insurance.dask.introP1: DASK (compulsory earthquake insurance) is the legal product in Türkiye that secures residential buildings against earthquake and earthquake-related losses. It is required for homeowners and is requested for title work, electricity and water subscriptions, and many other formalities.
insurance.dask.introP2: As İlsa Insurance we arrange your DASK policy quickly at competitive prices and help you keep your property continuously protected.
insurance.dask.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and official DASK policy documents.
insurance.dask.needTitle: What you need to know about compulsory earthquake insurance (DASK)
insurance.dask.needBody: Under Türkiye’s disaster insurance legislation, privately owned residential premises and independent sections used as commercial premises or offices must have compulsory earthquake insurance (DASK). DASK covers damage caused directly or indirectly by earthquakes, including subsequent fire, explosion, tsunami, and landslide damage to insured buildings.
insurance.dask.needListIntro: DASK provides protection for fundamental building elements:
insurance.dask.needList1: Shared walls separating main and independent sections
insurance.dask.needList5: Main structural elements of the insured building as defined in the policy wording
insurance.dask.needClosing: You can start the policy process quickly with your DASK (UAVT) address code or by searching with your full address — our team at İlsa Insurance will guide you through the steps.
insurance.dask.coverLead: Compulsory earthquake insurance covers the following:
insurance.dask.coverItem1: Earthquake-related damage to the insured building
insurance.dask.coverItem3: Explosion linked to an earthquake event
insurance.dask.coverItem4: Landslide linked to an earthquake event
insurance.dask.coverItem5: Damage to the building’s load-bearing system caused by an earthquake
insurance.dask.coverItem6: Other covered perils stated in the information form and general terms
insurance.dask.coverFootnote: Cover applies to the structure itself. For household contents we recommend arranging separate home insurance with the extensions you need.
insurance.dask.diffTitle: The difference between DASK and home insurance
insurance.dask.diffP1: DASK only covers earthquake and earthquake-related damage to the insured building.
insurance.dask.diffP2: Home insurance can also cover fire, flood, theft, and many other risks, including contents. For the most comprehensive protection, both policies are usually recommended together.
insurance.dask.compareLead: Protect your building against earthquake damage and related disasters such as fire, explosion, tsunami, and landslide with compulsory earthquake insurance (DASK). Combine with home insurance when you need contents and wider perils.
insurance.dask.compareRow1Label: Earthquake and earthquake-related structural damage (as defined in the policy)
insurance.dask.compareRow2Label: Household contents and wider non-earthquake perils
insurance.dask.compareFootnote: Illustrative comparison — exact guarantees depend on your DASK schedule and the home policy you choose.
insurance.dask.pricingIntro: Premiums are calculated using criteria such as:
insurance.dask.pricingBullet1: City or district where the property is located (for example Ankara)
insurance.dask.calcBody: Across insurers the same DASK tariff principles apply. The insured location is identified with the UAVT address code, and the earthquake risk zone of that address is one of the main price drivers together with construction type and gross area.
insurance.dask.calcClosing: To obtain an indicative premium you need your property’s UAVT address code or the full address so the building can be matched to the correct risk band.
insurance.dask.why4: Renewal reminders so cover does not lapse
insurance.dask.why5: Support through claims and official procedures
insurance.dask.expertSlide1Quote: Do not let DASK lapse at renewal — continuity matters for utilities and for uninterrupted structural protection after an earthquake.
insurance.dask.expertSlide2Quote: Match UAVT data carefully to the actual building; premium and eligibility follow the declared construction class and floor area.
insurance.dask.expertSlide3Quote: Pair DASK with home insurance when you need contents, glass, and liability — the two products answer different questions.
insurance.dask.faqSectionLead: Answers below summarise typical DASK arrangements in Türkiye — your binding wording and tariff notices always prevail. For tailored advice, contact İlsa Insurance.
insurance.dask.faq1A: DASK is the mandatory earthquake product for eligible residential buildings in Türkiye. It indemnifies structural damage from earthquakes and certain follow-on events such as fire, explosion, tsunami, and landslide, within the limits and exclusions of the pool rules.
insurance.dask.faq2A: Yes — for eligible properties, maintaining valid DASK is a legal requirement and a valid policy is commonly requested when opening or transferring electricity, water, and natural gas subscriptions, and for many property-related formalities.
insurance.dask.faq3A: DASK responds to earthquake damage to the insured building and to damage from fire, explosion, tsunami, or landslide where these arise from an earthquake event. Movable contents are not covered — arrange home contents cover separately if needed.
insurance.dask.faq4Q: How much coverage does DASK provide?
insurance.dask.faq4A: The insured limit is set according to the tariff and the declared characteristics of the building; it is updated periodically. For the current limit that applies to your address, confirm on the official tariff information or ask İlsa Insurance when you request a quote.
insurance.dask.faq5A: Premiums follow the national tariff and depend mainly on earthquake risk zone, construction type, gross area, building age, and the declared address via UAVT. İlsa Insurance compares partner channels so you see a clear premium indication for your property.
insurance.dask.faq6Q: How often must DASK be renewed?
insurance.dask.faq6A: DASK is issued for a one-year term and should be renewed before expiry to avoid a gap in mandatory cover and to keep utility and administrative processes straightforward.
insurance.dask.faq7Q: Can I open electricity or water without DASK?
insurance.dask.faq7A: No — new electricity, water, or natural gas subscriptions for eligible premises generally require a valid DASK policy. Keep renewal dates in your calendar or ask İlsa Insurance for a reminder service.
insurance.dask.faq8A: Owners of eligible residential buildings with title deed records must arrange DASK. Buyers, mortgage borrowers, and landlords in scope of the rules should also ensure continuous valid cover for the insured building.
insurance.dask.docsLead: You can view product information forms and key documents here.
insurance.dask.doc1Title: General terms and conditions of compulsory earthquake insurance
insurance.dask.doc2Title: Compulsory earthquake insurance — policy information form
insurance.dask.bottomCtaTitle: Need a DASK policy or renewal?
insurance.dask.bottomCtaBody: Contact İlsa Insurance for a fast quotation and help with UAVT address details.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.heroSubtit: Extra health insurance for people already covered by SGK (Social Security Institution).
insurance.supplementaryHealth.introP1: Supplementary health insurance (TSS) is a type of insurance that allows you to receive healthcare services in private hospitals contracted with the Social Security Institution (SGK) without paying the usual fee differences on top of SGK tariffs. It offers faster, more comfortable access alongside state hospitals, within the limits of your chosen product.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.introP2: At İlsa Insurance we compare supplementary health insurance options to suit your budget and help you choose the most suitable policy from our partner insurers.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.mockDiscla: Illustrative page — contact İlsa Insurance for binding quotes and policy wording.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.coverTitle: What does supplementary health insurance cover?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.coverLead: Depending on the chosen policy, it may include the following coverages:
insurance.supplementaryHealth.coverFootn: Coverage scope may vary depending on the insurance company and the schedule you select.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.whoItem3: Individuals within eligible age bands (commonly up to age 65 — confirm on your quote)
insurance.supplementaryHealth.whoItem4: Households who want a family policy structure
insurance.supplementaryHealth.whoItem5: Anyone with valid SGK entitlements seeking coordinated private-hospital access
insurance.supplementaryHealth.whoFootnot: Eligibility, waiting periods, and underwriting rules are set by the insurer — İlsa Insurance checks the details with you before inception.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.whyProduct: You can reduce or eliminate extra fee differences at contracted private hospitals when SGK coordination applies.
Shorter appointment and admission journeys compared with relying on informal out-of-pocket arrangements alone.
More comfortable treatment settings where your product’s hospital list matches your preferences.
Competitive premiums when the benefit design is matched to how you actually use healthcare.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.advLead: Secure your health with the right supplementary plan — benefits depend on the package you bind.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv1Body: Comprehensive check-up benefits on selected programmes can include blood tests, chest X-ray, ECG, and cholesterol screening — see your information form for the exact menu.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv2Body: Some products promote continuous renewal rights subject to insurer rules, continuous cover history, and good-faith disclosures — confirm eligibility wording on your offer.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv3Body: Optional maternity modules can bundle delivery and antenatal benefits where the insurer includes them — always check sub-limits and waiting periods.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv4Body: Many plans include periodic dental check-up access through contracted clinic networks for insured persons from age 1, depending on package.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv5Body: You can often choose between different hospital lists and outpatient visit packages so the policy reflects how you use healthcare.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.adv6Body: Depending on product rules, children under 18 can sometimes be insured on their own certificate — ask İlsa Insurance whether your chosen plan allows it.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.why1: Multiple insurer offers compared side by side
insurance.supplementaryHealth.why2: Competitive pricing from our partner panel
insurance.supplementaryHealth.why4: Fast policy issuance when you decide
insurance.supplementaryHealth.why5: Renewal reminders and ongoing policy support
insurance.supplementaryHealth.expertSlid: Start with the hospital list you really use — supplementary value collapses if your preferred providers are not in-network for the tier you bought.
Ask explicitly about outpatient visit counts, co-payments, and exclusions for chronic follow-up — these drive satisfaction more than brochure headlines.
If you travel often, do not assume SGK supplementary cover works abroad — pair domestic TSS with travel medical cover when needed.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faqSection: You can find answers to common questions about supplementary health insurance below. For binding answers about your own situation, contact İlsa Insurance.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq1A: Supplementary health insurance is a private health product that helps cover the difference in costs for healthcare expenses coordinated with the Social Security Institution (SGK) at contracted private hospitals, within the limits and exclusions of your policy — excluding any mandatory SGK co-payment rules that still apply by law.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq2Q: Who can purchase supplementary health insurance?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq2A: Many programmes insure persons from babies older than 14 days up to age 64 (inclusive) at first entry, subject to insurer acceptance criteria and medical disclosure — confirm the exact age band on your quote.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq3Q: What is the difference between supplementary health insurance and private health insurance?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq3A: Private health insurance products can vary widely in networks and benefit design. Supplementary health insurance is typically structured around SGK-coordinated access to contracted private providers and may offer a more affordable route when your priority is fee-difference cover rather than a fully private international-style plan.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq4Q: Will my supplementary health insurance cover my existing conditions?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq4A: Costs related to illnesses or conditions that existed before the policy start are generally excluded or subject to waiting periods — read your personal schedule and ask İlsa Insurance to explain how your disclosures map to underwriting.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq5Q: Is my supplementary health insurance policy valid abroad?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq5A: Typical supplementary products arranged for SGK coordination in Türkiye are not designed for treatment abroad. If you need cover overseas, ask İlsa Insurance about a separate travel health product that matches your destination and trip length.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq6Q: How many outpatient treatment coverages are included?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq6A: Outpatient visit entitlements depend on the package you choose — many insurers offer tiered programmes (for example higher versus standard outpatient visit limits). Your policy schedule states the exact number and any co-payments.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq7Q: How is premium calculated in supplementary health insurance?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq7A: Premiums depend on factors such as the plan tier, hospital network, age, risk area, and region, and are personalised at quote stage.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq8Q: Is supplementary health insurance tax deductible?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq8A: Premiums may be deductible from the income tax base within limits set under the Income Tax Law (for example caps linked to gross income and the annual minimum wage concept). This is general information only and is not tax advice — confirm with your accountant.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq9Q: What is the lifetime renewal guarantee for supplementary health insurance?
insurance.supplementaryHealth.faq9A: Where insurers promote a renewal guarantee, it is usually subject to medical and technical assessment, continuous renewal history, first entry before a stated age (often 64 inclusive), and the principle of utmost good faith. Exact conditions are defined only in the insurer’s policy wording.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.docsLead: General health insurance terms, supplementary special terms, and the policy information form — keep copies with your policy file.
insurance.supplementaryHealth.doc1Title: General terms and conditions of health insurance
insurance.supplementaryHealth.doc2Title: Supplementary health insurance — special terms and conditions
insurance.supplementaryHealth.doc3Title: Supplementary health insurance — policy information form
insurance.supplementaryHealth.bottomCtaB: Contact İlsa Insurance for indicative quotes and help choosing a network that fits your family.
